name: Solution Architect
description: Reads the feature specification and designs the technical architecture: system components, data flow, database schema changes, API contracts, and non-functional requirements.

checks.pass: 🔗 Feature spec contract loaded from BA

checks.prompt:
Design the technical architecture for this feature:
{spec_input}

Produce:
1. Component diagram description (which services are involved)
2. Database schema changes (tables, columns, indices)
3. API contract (request/response shapes with TypeScript types)
4. Event schema (for the notification events)
5. Non-functional requirements (latency target, scalability notes)

Context: {retryContext}

Review the architecture design for: (1) scalability concerns, (2) single points of failure, (3) missing error handling paths, (4) alignment with the feature spec acceptance criteria. Output a final approved architecture document.
